premiumPicksHowToPlayStep1Description:
Tickets will be earned based on the total daily deposit amount:

• {{currency}} {{ticketDeposit1}} deposit: Earn 1 ticket
• {{currency}} {{ticketDeposit2}} deposit: Earn 1 additional ticket
• {{currency}} {{ticketDeposit3}} deposit: Earn 1 additional ticket

Daily limit: Each player may receive a maximum of three (3) tickets per day.
premiumPicksHowToPlayStep2Description: Use your available tickets to vote for Champion team, Top Scorer, and predict the final match score as you like.
premiumPicksHowToPlayStep3Description: Winners with correct predictions will share the total prize pool.
premiumPicksPrizeScheme1Description: This campaign will distribute a total prize pool of {{currency}} {{prizePool}} among participants who make correct Champion predictions.
premiumPicksPrizeScheme2Description: This campaign will distribute a total prize pool of {{currency}} {{prizePool}} among participants who make correct Golden Boot predictions.
premiumPicksPrizeScheme3Description: This campaign will distribute a total prize pool of {{currency}} {{prizePool}} among participants who make correct score predictions.

tcModalS1B1: This promotion is open to all registered Uwin33 members.
tcModalS1B2: Participation in the prediction challenge is free of charge for every eligible player.
tcModalS2B1: This event will run from 01 June 2026 (00:00 {{timezone}}) to 20 July 2026 (23:59 {{timezone}}).
tcModalS3Intro: The challenge consists of four (4) prediction cycles. Players must submit their predicted results for the matches opened during each specific stage:
tcModalS4B1: Participants must achieve the required number of correct predictions for the specific cycle to unlock Free Prizes.
tcModalS4B2: Prizes will be automatically released to the player's account once the win targets are met and match results are officially verified.
tcModalS5Intro: For players with no prior deposit history using winnings generated from "Free Prizes":
tcModalS5B1: The minimum withdrawal amount is {{currency}} {{minWithdrawal}}, and the maximum withdrawal amount is strictly capped at {{currency}} {{maxWithdrawal}}.
tcModalS5B2: Any remaining balance exceeding this {{currency}} {{maxWithdrawal}} limit will be automatically forfeited upon withdrawal.
tcModalS5B3: Uwin33 reserves the right to modify, suspend, or cancel the promotion at any time without prior notice.
tcPpS1B1: This promotion is open to all registered Uwin33 members.
tcPpS1B2: Participation tickets are earned based on Total Daily Accumulated Deposits:
tcPpS1B3: Daily Limit: Each player is entitled to a maximum of three (3) tickets per day.
tcPpS1B4: Unused tickets for any stage will be voided once that specific campaign period ends.
tcPpS2Intro: Participants can use their tickets to predict three major outcomes of the FIFA World Cup 2026:
tcPpS3B1: Shared Prize Pool: The prize pool for each event will be divided equally by the total number of winning entries.
tcPpS3B2: Multiple Entries: Players may place multiple predictions on the same outcome (Team, Player, or Score). Winnings are calculated as:
tcPpS3Formula: (Total Prize Pool ÷ Total Winning Entries) × Number of your correct tickets.
tcPpS3Ex1: Championship Guess: If the prize per entry is {{currency}} {{championshipExamplePerTicket}} and you have 6 correct tickets, your payout is {{currency}} {{championshipExamplePayout}}.
tcPpS3Ex2: Golden Boot: If the prize per entry is {{currency}} {{goldenBootExamplePerTicket}} and you have 3 correct tickets, your payout is {{currency}} {{goldenBootExamplePayout}}.
tcPpS3Ex3: Final Score: If the prize per entry is {{currency}} {{finalScoreExamplePerTicket}} and you have 2 correct tickets, your payout is {{currency}} {{finalScoreExamplePayout}}.
tcPpS3Payment: Payment Date: All winnings will be credited directly to the winners' Uwin33 wallets on 20 July 2026 at 12:00 PM ({{timezone}}).
tcPpS4B1: Final Score Rule: For the "Final Correct Score Guess," only the result within 90 minutes of regulation time (including injury time) counts. Extra time and penalty shootouts are excluded.
tcPpS4B2: Uwin33 reserves the right to modify, suspend, or cancel the promotion at any time without prior notice.
